text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... Wasn't expecting to find a crowd here.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And I thought I could be alone if I came to the
roof.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. I'll just be over there taking a nap.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Then I'll sleep on the opposite side.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Fine.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we have a lot of visitors today! Hope you
don't mind one more.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm? Something smells really good...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I better chow down before this gets cold!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I'm smelling... hamburgers?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Damn it... Whose idea was it to bring meat to the
rooftop? How am I supposed to sleep?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that would be me. The weather's perfect for a
picnic!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... It's way too early for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
This is my breakfast. I'm making up for having
overslept. I was craving a good flame-grilled
burger, so I ordered one to arrive during break.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You got it delivered to the academy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, care for a bite? I always get the family pack,
so there's plenty to go around.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No, thank you...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
You sure? A rumbling stomach means it's time to
eat. Your body's primed and ready to absorb
nutrients.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Is that so... Okay, I'll have some.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's your fault we're craving some meat. Give
one here, too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Urk... I feel full already...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I'll eat whatever you can't, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Here, you can have my vegetables too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You should eat your own vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hehe, funny how exciting this picnic has become!
